title: The Update Log #2 - Radiolab Follow-Ups (Jul 2026)
description: Update Log #2 - seven Radiolab threads you flagged, chased to 2026 and fact-checked. The Supreme Court's legitimacy crisis (the ethics scandals, the toothless new ethics code, the stalled reforms); Candida auris going from mystery to entrenched hospital pathogen; how the LLM boom reshapes the 'no perfect translation' argument; how COVID became the deadliest US pandemic by raw count and what 1918 warns about forgetting; what became of biologist Brandon Ogbunu; how the 'major questions doctrine' - not the Commerce Clause - quietly rewired federal power, then struck down Trump's tariffs; and the embattled afterlife of radio artist Joe Frank. First officer, out.
